blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt head to San Siro — Norway's greatest Champions League night awaits
A 3-1 first-leg advantage brought them here — Bodo/Glimt need only to hold firm at San Siro. Norwegian football has never stood this close to the Champions League quarter-finals.
⛷️ Thu–Sun — Biathlon WC Kontiolahti: Bø, Røiseland lead Norway's medal charge in Finland
